quote.engagementSubtitle: A focused scope across 3 work areas tailored to your operation.

deliverables.title: Production Line Optimization
deliverables.body: Process mapping, bottleneck analysis, and a 90-day remediation plan with measurable throughput targets.

deliverables.title: Quality Control Framework
deliverables.body: A documented QC protocol covering inspection cadence, defect classification, and escalation rules — handed off to your floor lead.

deliverables.title: Operator Training
deliverables.body: Two on-site sessions covering the new protocol plus a reference guide each operator keeps at their station.

schedule.label: Week 1–2
schedule.body: Discovery and current-state mapping. Two days on site.

schedule.label: Week 3–8
schedule.body: Remediation playbook authored and reviewed with leadership.

schedule.label: Week 9–12
schedule.body: Training delivery, handoff, and a 30-day check-in.

nextStepText: Kickoff scheduled for Monday, April 28 at 9:00 AM.
